title: Supervisor (Isetan) - 5 DAYS WORK WEEK
description:
O'Coffee Club - Our Story (Non-Halal) https://www.ocoffeeclub.com/

Singaporeans are welcome.

☕ We are passionate about premium coffee craft, focusing on everything from bean sourcing to roasting and brewing. 🌟 If you’re passionate about food & beverage, love working in a dynamic café culture, and want to be part of a brand with deep roots in the local community and regional presence — we want you!

What Makes Us Unique
• A robust menu featuring signature drinks, all-day breakfast, hearty mains, pastas, desserts, and creative beverages (non-Halal). SG Eats
• Modern café environments ideal for social gatherings, casual work sessions, and everyday dining.
• Multiple locations across Singapore including Raffles City, Jewel Changi Airport, Academia, Paragon Indulgence, T3 Airport, and more.

Our offer:

For more details: O'Coffee Club - Our Story (ocoffeeclub.com)

——————————

✨Staff benefits✨

  • 5 Days Work Week (Including Sat, Sun & PH)
  • Attractive Salary Package
  • Medical Benefits
  • Birthday Benefit
  • Staff Discount
  • Staff Meal Allowances
  • Great Career Progression
  • Various Locations

Responsibilities:

  • Greet guests warmly, manage seating arrangements, and ensure smooth guest flow.
  • Take accurate food and beverage orders and serve them promptly according to service standards.
  • Handle customer inquiries, special requests, and feedback professionally.
  • Manage service recovery and ensure guest satisfaction at all times.
  • Oversee daily front-of-house operations to maintain smooth and efficient service.
  • Coordinate closely with the kitchen and bar teams to ensure timely and accurate orders.
  • Ensure compliance with hygiene, safety, and service SOPs.
  • Lead and supervise service staff during shift operations.
  • Maintain cleanliness and organization of dining areas, service stations, and equipment.
  • Perform opening and closing duties for the outlet.
  • Perform any ad-hoc duties assigned by your superior

Requirements:

  • Passion for service and F&B industry
  • Positive work attitude and a team player

postedCompany.description:
COFFEE CLUB PTE LTD an ISO 9001:2000 and HACCP certified company established since 1991, takes pride in setting the standards with our mission to remain the leading café chain in Singapore offering gourmet food and coffee with excellent customer service.

 

Coffee Club Pte Ltd opened Singapore's first gourmet coffee house at Holland Village in 1991. With its own on-site coffee roasting facilities, the outlet set a new standard for world-class coffee delivery. The result was a taste that was consistenly more flavourful and aromatic than its nearest rivals. For 21 years, customers have returned to the cosy two-storey establishment to enjoy their favourite cup.

 

Today Coffee Club Pte Ltd has more than 20 outlets across Singapore, Malaysian and Indonesia, each united in the drive to bring customers a pleasant contemporary all-day cafe experience- one that blends friendly and distinctive service with an environment that celebrates the best in the cafe lifestyle.
postedCompany.name: COFFEE CLUB PTE LTD
